intro: Between April 13 and 24, 2026, ZCyberNews covered 13 high-severity incidents under the APT tag, with GopherWhisper, CyberAv3ngers, and Sapphire Sleet emerging as the most frequently observed threat actors. These campaigns primarily targeted government, cryptocurrency, energy, technology, and healthcare sectors across Mongolia, Asia, Bangladesh, Central America, and East Asia. The reporting reflects a concentrated period of activity against these regions and industries, with all 13 articles assessed at a high severity level.
